title: Speacs PvP Essentials
description: a texturepack that keeps vanilla minecrafts style and just adds some stuff for pvp
body:
PvP Essentials that are kept Vanilla-style.
 This texturepack gets updates every few weeks/days.
 it can be used as an overlay.

Features:

V1
- smaller viewmodels for items and food
- side shield and small blocking
- no eating particles
- low fire
- no pumpkinblur
- clear water
- small totem pop

V2
- no explosion particles
- obvious tripwire and powdersnow
- unobstrusive rain and snow
- new texture for fire and soulfire

V3
- small totem pop particles
- unobstrusive potion particles(transparent)
- ore borders

V4
- no smoke particles over fire
- 15% smaller Mace
- bugfix: fire is not floating 1 pixel over ground anymore

V5
- potion indicators/look in changelog for more

This is not getting further updates besides port to newer versions.Im making new projects like this one in different styles,maybe even a remake of this pack with new stuff
